sections.name: Missa
lines: Salve Sancta parens (post Purificationem usque ad Dominica Palmarum)

sections.name: Comment
lines: # III Mass of the B. V. M. – Salve, Sancta Parens

sections.name: Graduale
lines: Blessed and venerable are you, O Virgin Mary, who, with unsullied virginity, were found to be the Mother of the Saviour.
V. O Virgin, Mother of God, He Whom the whole world does not contain, becoming man, shut Himself in your womb. Alleluia, alleluia.
The rod of Jesse has blossomed: a Virgin has brought forth God and man: God has given peace, reconciling in Himself the lowest with the highest. Alleluia.
